ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the IP address is allocated (e.g., apnic) */,
  "ip_version" TEXT /* Version of the IP address (e.g., ipv4, ipv6) */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address itself (in string format) */,
  "prefix_length" INTEGER /* Prefix length of the IP address */,
  "allocation_state" TEXT /* Current allocation state of the IP address (e.g., allocated, assigned) */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was allocated */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was assigned */,
  "deallocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was deallocated (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the IP address */,
  "parent_ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent IP address (for hierarchical tracking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_addresses_allocation_state FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_state") REFERENCES allocation_states ("allocation_state"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_addresses_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the region */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "asn" TEXT /* Autonomous System Number (ASN) of the organization */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the organization */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the organization */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the organization (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES country_codes ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_asn FOREIGN KEY ("asn") REFERENCES asn ("asn_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_address_orgs" (
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization started using the IP address */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization stopped using the IP address (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address_id", "org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asn" (
  "asn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ASN */,
  "asn_number" TEXT /* ASN number */,
  "asn_name" TEXT /* Name of the ASN */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the ASN */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the ASN */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the ASN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_codes" (
  "country_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country code */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_codes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocation_states" (
  "allocation_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation state */,
  "allocation_state" TEXT /* Allocation state (e.g., allocated, assigned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the allocation state */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the allocation state is final (e.g., deallocated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, registry staff, external user) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the IP address */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ip_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., allocation state, organization) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "ip_address_version" TEXT /* Version of the IP address at the time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_history_ip_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
